data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Confirmation of each item with timestamp', but the provided evidence does not include any details or endpoints that demonstrate this capability. While the linked use case mentions that a patient checks off 'watched video' and a timestamp is recorded, there is no concrete evidence provided to confirm that this functionality is consistently applied across all checklist items. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming timestamps for all checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for timestamp confirmation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify timestamp recording for each checklist item.
